PROP-01b-partial3-inv-038.text: AuctionBidder pre-approves exact assetOutAmount when no solution provided (no callback).
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-038.assertion: forall AuctionBidder.bid(sol=empty): forceApprove(auction, getAssetOutAmount(...)) before bid()

locations.note: lines 75-79: if solution.length==0 => forceApprove(auction, getAssetOutAmount(...)) before calling auction.bid
